blockingIssues.description: The TUI footer/help block still uses Constraint::Length(3) while rendering four content lines inside a bordered block, so the selected-account/runtime divergence copy and key help are clipped off-screen. This makes the console fail both the TUI readability contract and the CLI/runtime-truthfulness feature's operator-facing explanation goals.

The TUI background polling path still calls GET /v1/models whenever /healthz succeeds, which goes through the proxy and mutates total_proxied_requests, successful_upstream_responses, and potentially last_refresh/auth state. Leaving the console open therefore contaminates the runtime stats it is supposed to observe.

nonBlockingIssues.description: runtime_stats.account_count currently reports all saved state entries rather than only runtime-usable Codex accounts, so mixed-provider saved state can overstate runtime-usable account count.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `init`, `typecheck`, and `lint` commands so scrutiny/user-testing workers can bootstrap the Rust slice and run the full validator suite from shared service metadata.
Documented in `.factory/library/environment.md` that `./.factory/init.sh` fetches Rust dependencies and creates `rust/proxypilot-rs.toml` when missing before smoke validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that mission artifacts may live under `/home/fsos/.factory/missions/<id>` even when repo-relative `.factory/missions/...` paths are absent, and instruct workers to fall back to the absolute mission directory before treating missing files as blockers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports for `shared-auth-runtime-domain` and `fix-tui-runtime-truthfulness` both recorded ENOENT attempts against repo-relative mission paths before successfully reading `/home/fsos/.factory/missions/7e6968f8-b3d3-4772-9518-ca3a93ea1374/...`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For TUI features that change visible copy or layout, require a layout-fit visibility check (render/snapshot or terminal smoke) in addition to helper-string assertions so multi-line regions are proven visible.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `terminal-tui-operator-console` and `cli-state-runtime-truthfulness-and-docs` failed review because the footer stayed at `Constraint::Length(3)` while rendering four lines, yet the worker tests only asserted helper-string content.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce the mission boundary that only docs-scoped features may edit `docs/rust-replatform.md` or `README.md`, and direct workers to defer such changes to the explicit docs-alignment feature when possible.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports for `proxy-runtime-stats-surface` and `terminal-tui-operator-console` both recorded edits to `docs/rust-replatform.md` despite mission AGENTS guidance reserving docs changes for docs-alignment work.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a dedicated mock upstream/refresh service definition to `.factory/services.yaml` for runtime smoke validation.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: the reviewed mock servers were scenario-specific one-off fixtures with ad hoc ports and behavior, so a generic shared service entry would risk encoding the wrong workflow. The concrete bootstrap/config discovery gap was handled instead via additive command/library updates.
